scripts.dev:backend: bash -lc 'cd apps/backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload'
scripts.demo:start: npm run demo:setup && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run demo:backend" "npm run demo:frontend"
scripts.lint:backend: bash -lc 'cd apps/backend && uv run ruff check .'
scripts.contracts:check: bash -lc 'npm run generate:contracts && git diff --exit-code -- packages/shared/openapi.json packages/shared/src/generated/api.ts'
scripts.db:revision: bash -lc 'cd apps/backend && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate'
scripts.db:upgrade: bash -lc 'cd apps/backend && uv run alembic upgrade head'
scripts.quality: npm run contracts:check && npm run lint:frontend && npm run typecheck:frontend && npm run lint:backend && npm run typecheck:backend && npm run test:backend
scripts.generate:contracts: bash -lc 'cd apps/backend && uv run python scripts/export_openapi.py && cd ../.. && openapi-typescript packages/shared/openapi.json -o packages/shared/src/generated/api.ts'
scripts.langfuse:bootstrap: bash -lc 'cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.llm.bootstrap.seed_langfuse'
scripts.langfuse:evals: bash -lc 'cd apps/backend && uv run python -m app.llm.evals.run_langfuse_evals'
